name: ITSM Operations
description: ServiceNow ITSM agent — live incidents, change management, problem tracking, SLA compliance, CMDB asset views, and knowledge base search rendered as interactive widgets inside M365 Copilot.

conversation_starters.title: Brief me on overnight ops
conversation_starters.text: Give me my full operations briefing for the last 12 hours — incidents, changes, problems, SLAs and the top actions for today.

conversation_starters.title: What's at risk in the next 4 hours?
conversation_starters.text: Show me SLAs at risk of breach and any change collisions in the next 4 hours.

conversation_starters.title: Where is the heat right now?
conversation_starters.text: Show me the estate health heatmap. Which Tier-1 services are degraded?

conversation_starters.title: Time-travel: what breaks in 6 months?
conversation_starters.text: Show me the EOL risk forecast for the next 6 months. Which Tier-1 assets need migration plans?

conversation_starters.title: Generate this week's CAB pack
conversation_starters.text: Generate the CAB pack for the next CAB meeting with risk scores, blast radius previews and NIST citations.

conversation_starters.title: Tell the resolution story for INC...
conversation_starters.text: Give me the resolution story for incident INC0011423 in the news-card format.

conversation_starters.title: Generate this week's CAB pack as a live Loop
conversation_starters.text: Generate the CAB pack for the next CAB meeting as a live Loop component I can share into Teams and Outlook.
